title: Block Duplicator Tree
description: A new updated mod of the duplicating trees!! Trees that will duplicate your ores (only blocks) for you to be rich and a fast and very OP evolution in my world!
body:
Welcome to the "**Block Duplicator Tree Mod**" (or Ores Tree Mod) project. A project that aims to bring back the old Mod of trees that duplicate ores/blocks. A mod that was stuck in past versions but today I'm remaking it for our most recent versions, for now it's in BETA, but soon it will have many more modifications and news!

In this initial BETA version, the Tree Ores Mod has the addition of the Diamond Tree, a very OP tree for the game but expensive to create. It does not appear naturally and can only be made with some diamond blocks and the Magic Tree sapling, which is initially just an item to be used in Crafting.

The Mod will possibly have the additions of the Magic Tree (which is already in the game but only for Crafting use) and the Emerald Tree that were initially used but were removed due to Bugs among others. The Diamond Tree will be present as the Mod's initial item, which is already working to duplicate your ores!

NOTE: This mod is compatible with any other Mod, you can use any Block from any Mod and the tree will duplicate normally!

Have fun! :D
